name: Vegetable Curry (Jung)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat ghee in a large pot over medium heat.
2. Add cumin, coriander seeds, ginger, garlic, and onion. Stir-fry for 1 minute.
3. Add turmeric, garam masala, chili powder, minced red chili, and bay leaves. Mix well and stir-fry for another minute.
4. Add the mixed vegetables, potatoes, and tomatoes. Mix well and cook until all ingredients are tender, about 5 minutes.
5. Pour in water and bring to a boil.
6. Stir in white vinegar, tamari, and pepper. Adjust seasoning if needed.
7. Serve hot over boiled rice.
